topWPAPlays.description: Mauricio Dubón singles on a ground ball to first baseman Christopher Morel. Mike Yastrzemski scores. Ha-Seong Kim to 3rd. Ronald Acuña Jr. to 2nd.
Kyle Stowers doubles (5) on a line drive to right fielder José Azócar. Otto Lopez scores. Esteury Ruiz scores.
Matt Olson singles on a ground ball to left fielder Heriberto Hernández. Ha-Seong Kim scores. Ronald Acuña Jr. scores. Mauricio Dubón to 3rd.
Michael Harris II homers (9) on a line drive to center field.
Matt Olson doubles (16) on a sharp line drive to right fielder Kyle Stowers. Ronald Acuña Jr. scores.
Zach McKinstry grounds out to first baseman Kyle Manzardo.

Elly De La Cruz triples (1) on a sharp line drive to left fielder Brandon Marsh, deflected by center fielder Justin Crawford.

Reds challenged (force play), call on the field was overturned: Matt McLain reaches on a fielder's choice, fielded by first baseman Bryce Harper. Blake Dunn scores. Tyler Stephenson to 3rd. Ke'Bryan Hayes to 2nd.

Brooks Lee strikes out swinging.
Michael Conforto grounds into a force out, second baseman Brice Turang to shortstop Joey Ortiz. Seiya Suzuki out at 2nd.
